name: keebmeet
author: Jan-Felix Abellera
description: A way to manage large-scale meetups for Tex Mechs

scripts.build:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w api
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @keebmeet/frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w @keebmeet/frontend
